$comment: Authoritative build-time configuration for flow-gen. Model tiers map to names exposed by your LiteLLM `model_list` — NOT to raw Anthropic/Bedrock model IDs. Edit the right-hand values to match `litellm --config` on your gateway, then re-run `npm run gen`.

environment.note: FLOW provides its own orchestration. It does not depend on Claude Code Dynamic Workflows or Agent Teams. See docs/flow/DECISION-GUIDE.md and CONTEXT.md.

modelTiers.$comment: left = FLOW canonical tier; right = LiteLLM model_list name your proxy serves.

copilot.$note: Copilot CLI ignores .github/prompts/. IDE chat (VS Code / JetBrains) is first-class; CLI is degraded and gets the workflow only via injected copilot-instructions.md.
